name: Power Hyaluronic Intensive Moisturising Emulsion
description:
100% ultra hydrating face emulsion cream. Provides 24h of continuous hydration. Light texture, suitable for normal to combination skins.

Formula with a high content of very low and high molecular weight hyaluronic acid.

name: Power Hyaluronic Intensive Moisturising Cream
description:
100% ultra hydrating face emulsion cream. Provides 24h of continuous hydration. Rich texture, suitable for dry to very dry skin

Formula with a high content of very low and high molecular weight hyaluronic acid.

name: Intensive moisturising booster for the face
description:
Intensive moisturising booster for the face. Very low and high molecular weight hyaluronic acid concentrate. Enhances the benefits of a daily moisturiser.

Provides 24h of continuous hydration.

name: Skeyndor Power Hyaluronic refreshing eyelash and eye contour gel Reduction of dark circles, smooths wrinkles, strengthens eyelashes
description:
Revitalising gel to rejuvenate eye contour and strengthen eyelashes. Has a lifting effect on eyelids, smooths contour wrinkles and reduces dark circles under the eyes.

Strengthens eyelashes and provides an instant revitalising effect. Has a lifting effect on eyelids, smooths eye contour wrinkles, reduces bags under the eyes, strengthens eyelashes and gives an instant revitalising effect

name: Power Hyaluronic 100% Ultra Moisturising, Hydrodynamic In-Salon Treatment
description:
Power Hyaluronic beauty salon treatment.
Balances the skin’s natural hydrodynamics for optimal hydration .

Power Hyaluronic enhances the skin’s natural hydrodynamics by combining hyaluronic acid of different molecular weights with a potent aquaporin activator. Professional visible results in just one session, 100% ultra moisturising, 90% improvement to dehydrated wrinkles, continuous hydration for 24 hours

name: Power Hyaluronic HA In-Salon Eye Contour and Eyelash Treatment
description:
Power Hyaluronic HA In-Salon Eye Contour and Eyelash Treatment. Eyelashes are a first line of defence for your eyes, keeping airborne dirt, dust, lint and other debris from reaching the delicate eye tissues.

Bad makeup removal techniques, a poor diet, lack of hydration, exposure to the sun or simply the passage of time cause eyelashes to weaken and eventually break or be shed. Make your eyelashes strong and healthy with the Power Hyaluronic HA in-salon treatment for eye contour and eyelashes.

name: Intense Moisturising Mask - Power hyaluronic mask
description:
Intense Moisturising Mask – Power hyaluronic mask- Moisturising power for your skin


A sorbet-textured mask with a moisturising and remineralising effect on the skin. A true skinhydration treatment.
Its special formula includes active ingredients that deeply moisturise, giving the skin a more hydrated, fresher and smoother appearance.

name: Meso Infusion Dcs
Megan by skeyndor
description:
THE FUTURE OF PROFESSIONAL AESTHETICS IS ALREADY HERE

Discover the most advanced technological, cosmetic innovation. MEGAN brings you closer to the future and helps you care for and improve your skin with a system that brings extraordinary cell regeneration from the deepest layers of skin tissue. This not this is no sci-fi movie. MEGAN is the reality of technology, developed by Skeyndor and based on the most ground-breaking beauty science techniques. The culmination of the knowledge and experience of 50 years of research.

name: Probiome Peel Post Peel Probiome Kit Tratamiento En Casa Restaurador 7 Dias
PROBIOME PEEL IN-SALON TREATMENT
description:
The innovative, state-of-the-art treatment that deeply replenishes your skin. With visible results from day one, PROBIOME PEEL is the professional treatment with maximum restorative properties.

5 highly effective peelings, formulated with a specific combination of acids specially suited to every skin type. A personalised, advanced, safe and easy-to-apply treatment that offers excellent skin regeneration.

name: Power C+ Energising Moisturising Emulsion
description:
Facial emulsion with highly absorbable vitamin C and pomegranate extract, an antioxidant combination for a more radiant glowing effect. Formulated to brighten and even out skin tone.

High antioxidant power, Glowing effect on the skin, Powerful anti-free radical action to shield skin against sun damage, Increases collagen production, Melanogenesis-inhibiting action with mild lightening effect on blemishes and minor dyschromia.

name: Power C+ Energising Moisturising Cream SPF15
description:
Anti-oxidant day cream for a more radiant glowing effect. Formulated with highly absorbable vitamin C and pomegranate extract, an antioxidant combination for a more radiant glowing effect.

High antioxidant power, Glowing effect on the skin, Powerful anti-free radical action to shield skin against sun damage, Increases collagen production, melanogenesis-inhibiting action with mild lightening effect on blemishes and minor dyschromia.

name: Power C+ Eye Contour Gel
description:
Creamy eye contour gel with highly absorbable vitamin C and pomegranate extract. Anti-puffiness treatment containing an antioxidant combination for a more radiant glowing effect; it smooths dark circles and small wrinkles, reducing eyelid puffiness and bags under the eyes.

High antioxidant power, glowing effect on the eye contour area, reduces dark circles, small wrinkles, eyelid puffiness and bags under the eyes.

name: Vitamin C Concentrate Treatment
description:
Shock treatment for the skin, restoring radiance and glow in just a few sessions. Contains a high concentration of ascorbic acid along with other natural acids that quickly improve the skin’s appearance.

Super oxide treatment with ampoules that restores your skin’s radiance and glow. Contains 7.5% pure Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) and a combination of phytic and ellagic acids; it comes in a 14 1ml/ampoule presentation.

name: New Power C+ Antioxidant Brightening Serum
description:
Triple antioxidant serum containing vitamin C, plus pomegranate and açaí extracts. Acts as a photoaging skin barrier. Gives the face a radiant “glow effect”. Boosts collagen production and evens out blemishes.

Triple antioxidant action that acts as a barrier against photoaging of the skin, radiant skin glow effect, powerful stimulator of collagen production, evens out blemishes and lightens minor dyschromia.

name: Power C+ In-Salon Treatment - ANTIOX-BRIGHTENING PROGRAMME 35%
description:
Power C+ ANTIOX-BRIGHTENING Programme 35% in-Salon Treatment.


Energising, Antioxidant and Brightening Treatment, 25% vit. C derivative
+ 10% pomegranate + Açaí HG extract

name: Instant brightening mask - Power C+ Mask
description:
Instant brightening mask – Power C+ Mask.

Rejuvenating mask with jelly texture with immediate brightening effect.
Its special formula includes repairing and antioxidant ingredients that exfoliate, unify and brighten the skin tone by deep cleansing.

name: Filler cream for deep wrinkles and expression lines
description:
Deep wrinkle and expression line corrector cream that fills and reduces wrinkles by combining two filling techniques

Helps the face look fuller and plumped-up. With a richer, more nourishing texture, ideal for dry skin.

name: Filler emulsion for deep wrinkles and expression lines
description:
Deep wrinkle and expression line correcting emulsion formulated to smooth out expression lines on the face.

. Combines dermal fillers with active decontracting ingredients to achieve fuller, plumper looking skin. Its lighter texture makes it ideal for combination skin

name: Wrinkle Refining Serum
description:
Correcting serum that refines, fills and decontracts the deepest wrinkles and expression lines due to its combination of peptides and active ingredients that relax the appearance of the face to reveal smoother, renewed skin

Employs the PEELING technique that has a potent DECONTRACTING effect. Formulated for all skin types.

name: Eye Contour Wrinkle Filler
description:
The eye contour expression line and deep wrinkle corrective cream which, thanks to its combination of peptides and active agents, relaxes the appearance of expression lines.

It reduces dark circles and bags under the eyes, leaving them looking more relaxed and less puffy. Creamy, nourishing gel texture for all skin types.

name: Eye Contour Filler for deep wrinkles and expression lines
description:
Corrective cream for expression lines and deep wrinkles around the lips. With triple anti-wrinkle action, anti-blemish and volume effect and a 25% lip volume increase

It combines two filling techniques together with a biological exfoliant and active ingredients that relax the appearance of expression lines and reduce upper lip wrinkles (barcode) and side wrinkles.

name: Corrective In-Salon Treatment
description:
Corrective triple-action anti-wrinkle in-salon treatment

The cosmetic treatment that reduces deep wrinkles and expression lines
quickly and effectively.
This innovative combination of triple-action mechanisms in a single treatment, peeling, firming and relaxing, effectively smooths the deepest of wrinkles.

name: Expert Cleanse Pro Rebalancing Vitamin Essence
Expert Cleanse PRO - Micellar Oil
description:
Specially formulated cleansing oil for extra personal hygiene. Leaves no traces or shine, for all skin types

A pale golden vanishing oil. It is formulated with natural, eco-certified emollients, a surfactant and ginger extract with an anti-pollution effect. Surface cleansing product, phase 1 of the EXPERT CLEANSE PRO double cleansing method. It removes makeup and pollution that has accumulated on the skin surface. Its fluid texture is very pleasant to apply and transforms into milk when removed with water.

name: Expert Cleanse Pro -Rich Foam-in-Milk
description:
Creamy emulsion that deeply cleanses impurities from the skin without drying it out

It contains natural emollients to nourish and protect the lipids of the barrier function in dry skin. An essential deep cleansing product, phase 2 of the EXPERT CLEANSE PRO double cleansing method. It deeply cleanses impurities from the skin without drying it out or damaging it. It is ideal for cleansing normal to dry skin.

name: Expert Cleanse Pro -Mattifying Foam Gel
description:
Foam gel for deeply cleansing impurities from the skin without drying it out or damaging it

Transforms into a pleasant mousse when frothed between the hands. An essential deep cleansing product, phase 2 of the EXPERT CLEANSE PRO double cleansing method; it eliminates excess oil/sebum and protects skin flora. Its matte finish makes it ideal for treating combination to oily skin.

name: Expert Cleanse PRO - Micellar Biphasic
description:
A makeup remover for the most sensitive parts of the face, such as the eye contour, eyelids, eyebrows and lips.

It is a two-colour crystalline biphasic formula, based on eco-certified vegetable emollients that form “dirt-trapping” micelles, and a natural extract that reduces environmental damage. With a light texture, it suits all skin types. Ophthalmologically tested.

name: Expert Cleanse PRO - In-Salon Treatment
description:
EXPERT CLEANSE PRO 10-step in-salon treatment.
The expert cosmetics line in facial skin hygiene. Perfect for deep cleansing and preparation of the skin before any facial treatment. A unique combination of skin hygiene and health, together with concern for the environment CLEAN SKIN & CLEAN COSMETIC.

The 100% ECO-FRIENDLY range, containing pre- and post-biotics to stimulate and protect the skin’s microbiota. With biodegradable ingredients and recycled/recyclable packaging. Our exclusive CARE CERTIFICATE guarantees our active commitment to sustainable production and packaging.

name: City Pollution Block Cream + O2 Revitalising Face Cream
description:
Revitalising moisturising face cream for fatigued skin caused by lack of oxygen.

Formula with a high content of Perfluorodecalin, an oxygen-trapping molecule, its formula combining protective prebiotic, oxygenating ingredients that fight against environmental pollution and have a deeply revitalising, oxygenating effect on the skin.

name: Revitalising Face Gel Cream - City Pollution Block Gel Cream + O2
description:
Moisturising gel cream that forms a protective film on the face, helping the skin to preserve hydration and restore its natural balance.

Gel cream that instantly leaves a unique, light, refreshing sensation. Its formula helps oxygenate the skin and protect it against environmental pollution by providing a barrier effect.

name: Anti-Pollution Detox Serum - City Pollution Barrier - Boosting Serum
description:
Moisturising anti-pollution detox serum for face and neck.

Its formula combines protective detoxifying and antioxidant active ingredients to protect the skin against urban pollution for a more intense global purifying effect.

name: Power Oxygen In-Salon Treatment
description:
Power Oxygen Skin Advanced Programme & Pollution Block In-Salon Treatment

Pollution and lack of oxygen are two major problems facing our skin on a daily basis. Power Oxygen’s double “City Pollution Block + O2” action protects the skin from environmental pollution and gives it the oxygen it needs.

name: Purifying mask intense- Power Oxygen Mask
description:
Purifying mask intense – Purifying power on your skin.

Its creamy clay texture with small exfoliating particles detoxifies and purifies the skin. Its special anti-pollution and oxygenating formula helps eliminate impurities and pollutants from the skin pores.

name: Eternal Redesnsifying cream
description:
Redensifying eternal cream with an absorbing texture to repulp and rejuvenate the skin.

Thanks to the power of its extraordinary plant based active ingredients, it redensifies skin texture, smoothing fine lines and wrinkles for eternal beauty.

name: Eternal In-Salon Treatment
description:
Redesensifying professional treatment Eternal

Visible, long-lasting clinical results.The efficacy of the new Eternal formulas has been backed up and proven by clinical studies with visible results and the impressive before and after images.

name: Extraordinary redensifying serum - Eternal with anti-wrinkle liposomes and stem cells
description:
Extraordinary serum with a luxurious texture that replumps
and redensifies the skin. An extraordinary formula based on
plant-based active ingredients with rejuvenating properties for
a radiant and eternally younger skin

Improves cell renewal rate by increasing the vital substances that form the skin, thereby restoring lost skin volume. The skin becomes fresher, more radiant and firmer.

name: Redensifying 2-Phase Catalyst Elixir - Eternal
description:
Bi-phase regenerative treatment inspired by epigenetic science

Innovative facial treatment that stimulates regeneration across all skin layers, helping reverse cellular ageing processes known as senescence.

Combines high-performance biotechnological actives with Eternal technology to visibly transform the skin with long-lasting anti-ageing results.

name: Redensifying eye contour cream- Eternal
description:
deal for reducing the appearance of the signs of ageing
in the eye area. Formulated with extraordinary plant
actives, smooths wrinkles, reduces dark circles and bags
under the eyes, and evens skin tone for a more refreshed,
rejuvenated look.

Specially formulated to counteract the loss of vital substrate and restore the volume of skin lost through ageing at its deepest layers. The face becomes fuller, smoother and firmer.

name: Redensifying night oil- Eternal
description:
Redensifying oil for mature skin with a silky texture and a fragrance with a hint of jasmine. Leaves the skin feeling smooth, relaxed and well nourished. Ideal for a unique experience that envelops all of the senses.

A unique combination of oils, essences and natural extracts with a non-greasy satin finish. Fragrance with hints of jasmine, enhancing well-being and restfulness.

name: Rich redesnifying cream - Eternal
description:
Rich Redensifying eternal cream with, richly textured cream specially designed for very dry skin.Makes the skin look younger and more radiant.

Repulps and redensifies skin texture thanks to the power of its
extraordinary plant based active ingredients, for beautiful,
younger-looking skin.

name: Casa de Carlota Skeyndor
description:
Skeyndor confía en La Casa de Carlota para el diseño de la campaña de Primavera.

Skeyndor trusts La Casa de Carlota to design its Spring campaign.

La Casa de Carlota ha sido la encargada de diseñar la campaña de primavera de Skeyndor, aportando su visión artística única para capturar la esencia de la marca. El resultado es un diseño lleno de color, emoción y significado, reflejo del talento de un equipo creativo que desafía los límites de la percepción del diseño.

La Casa de Carlota was entrusted with designing Skeyndor’s Spring campaign, bringing its unique artistic vision to capture the brand’s essence. The result is a design full of color, emotion, and meaning, a reflection of the talent of a creative team that challenges the boundaries of design perception.

name: Thermal Cleansing Gel
description:
Gentle cleansing gel for the daily care and cleansing of sensitive but oily skin.

Creates a natural moisture balance and provides a probiotic-like action,restoring the skin’s microbiota.

name: Cleansing emulsion forsensitive skins.
description:
Delicate cleansing milk to remove make-up and purify sensitive but dry skin.

Creates a natural moisture balance and provides a probiotic-like action, restoring the skin’s microbiota.

name: Thermal Water Concentrate
description:
Mist with mineral-thermal and marine water for the daily care of sensitive skin.

Mineralises and comforts the skin from tightness, leaving a pleasant sensation of freshness and softness.

name: Serum Aquatherm
description:
Delicate fluid that offers freshness and relief against the tightness and discomfort of sensitive skin.

It provides an anti-redness and anti-inflammatory effect and leaves the skin hydrated, looking more even and soothed. It is essential for travel and extreme climates.

name: Cream normal to oily skin Aquatherm
description:
Delicate cream for the daily care of normal to oily sensitive skin.

It promotes the gradual regularisation of sensitive skin by strengthening it against external aggressions and stimulating the skin’s microbiota.

name: Intensive cream normal to dry skin - Aquatherm
description:
Delicate cream for the daily care of normal to dry sensitive skin.

It promotes the gradual regularisation of sensitive skin by strengthening it against external aggressions and stimulating the skin’s microbiota.

name: age signs cream - Aquatherm
description:
Emollient cream for the daily care of mature or prematurely aged sensitive skin.

Revitalises and rejuvenates the appearance of the skin, stimulates its microbiota and relipidises the skin, restoring its protective barrier function.

name: Aquatherm Eye Contour Cream
description:
Gentle gel-in-cream formulated to treat the delicate eye contour area of sensitive skin.

Daily use soothes and comforts the eye contour, making the skin around the eyes smoother and more even.

name: Instant SOS Balm -Aquatherm
description:
Intensive soothing balm for the immediate comfort and relief of reactive, sensitive skin.

It has an anti-redness effect and immediate moisturising effect.

name: Relieving SOS cream - Aquatherm
description:
Intensive soothing cream for the fast and daily comfort of reactive, sensitive skin.

It has an immediate moisturising effect and makes the skin soft and nourished.

name: Thermal Water Concentrate
description:
Mist with mineral-thermal and marine water for the daily care of sensitive skin.

Mineralises and comforts the skin from tightness, leaving a pleasant sensation of freshness and softness.

name: Cabin treatment - Aquatherm
description:
A 4-step professional treatment that mineralises, hydrates and calms sensitive skin.

Specially developed treatment for sensitive and reactive skin problems, bringing immediate relief as well as treating the signs of premature skin ageing.

name: Power Retinol Intensive Repair Cream
description:
Anti-ageing cream with pure retinol concentrate. Works by intensely rejuvenating wrinkles and blemishes.

POWER RETINOL is the result of extensive research into retinoids and substances with retinoid or retinoid-like activity for use in the field of professional beauty treatments and aesthetic medicine. Designed to rejuvenate skin that has aged from natural causes or sun exposure (photoaging).

name: Power Retinol Intensive Repair Cream Serum
description:
Cream serum with pure retinol concentrate. Rejuvenating activity on wrinkles and blemishes. With interference pigments to achieve an instant perfecting effect. With interference pigments that give an instant perfecting effect.

A new generation of Pure Retinol.POWER RETINOL is the result of extensive research into retinoids and substances with retinoid or retinoid-like activity for use in the field of professional beauty treatments and aesthetic medicine. Designed to rejuvenate skin that has aged from natural causes or sun exposure (photoaging).

name: Power Retinol Intensive Repair Emulsion
description:
Anti-ageing emulsion with pure retinol concentrate. Intensely rejuvenates wrinkles and blemishes.

POWER RETINOL is the result of extensive research into retinoids and substances with retinoid or retinoid-like activity for use in the field of professional beauty treatments and aesthetic medicine. Designed to rejuvenate skin that has aged from natural causes or sun exposure (photoaging).

name: Power Retinol In-Salon Treatment
description:
Power Retinol Intensive Repairing Professional Programme – In-Salon Treatment

Triple retinol activity for maximum rejuvenating effects. Highly potent retinol
complex. A perfect synergy of three highly
rejuvenating ingredients. Maximum concentration of pure retinol (0.15%) in a single professional session*.

name: Global Lift Redefining Face and Neck Cream for normal to combination skin
description:
Global Lift Redefining Cream for face and neck, normal to combination skin. Firming moisturising cream that redefines the facial volume typical of youthful skin.

Firming, redefining, anti-wrinkle treatment for normal to combination skin. Its global firming action incorporates Skeyndor’s [ProGEN-in] technology for redefining the skin on face and neck. This cream helps the face to restore the facial volume typical of youthful skin.

name: Global Lift Redefining Face and Neck Cream for dry skin
description:
Global Lift redefining face and neck cream for dry skin. Firming moisturising cream that redefines the facial volume typical of youthful skin.

Firming, redefining, anti-wrinkle treatment for dry skin. Its global firming action incorporates Skeyndor’s [ProGEN-in] technology for redefining the skin on face and neck. This cream helps the face to restore the facial volume typical of youthful skin.

name: Global Lift Redefining Eye Contour Cream
description:
Firming, anti-wrinkle and anti-puffiness eye contour treatment.

Firms skin, reduces wrinkles and smooths dark circles under the eyes. Its triple orbicular action based on [ProGEN-in] technology firms the skin and reduces wrinkles, eyelid puffiness and dark circles and bags from under the eyes.

name: Global Lift Elixir for redefining face and neck
description:
Elixir for face and neck based on anti-ageing technology [ProGEN-in]

Redefines key facial contour areas, fights visible signs of ageing and helps restore skin tone.

name: Global Lift In-Salon Treatment
description:
Global Lift Advanced Cosmetic
in-Salon Treatment for a firming effect and facial volume restoration.

The [ProGEN-in] technology is based on the action of three specific active ingredients: biomimetic Elafin peptide, Menyanthes trifoliata extract and α-glucans and Rhamnogalacturonans
from black pepper (Piper nigrum).

name: Vshape Lifting Global Lift
Mattifying GBX Booster Clearist CTX
description:
Sebum-regulating booster to mattify the oily and shiny appearance of seborrhoeic, acne-prone skin.

Reinforced with GABA for a Baby Botulin-like sebum-reducing effect. Mattifies the skin from the very first application.

name: Exfoliating Care Lotion- Clearist CTX
description:
Instant Correcting Gel is a fast-acting, targeted treatment designed to treat localised blemishes and breakouts directly.

Its formula creates an invisible film with a concentrated exfoliating action that helps reduce the size of spots, speed up their resolution and minimise the risk of post-acne marks.

name: Mattifying Balance Gel-Emulsion.
description:
Mattifying Balance Gel-Emulsion for skin barrier and microbiome to prevent the appearance of impurities in acne-prone seborrhoeic skin.

Soothes and normalises redness and flaking caused by anti-acne treatments such as acids or oral vitamin A, without leaving the skin oily.

name: Exfoliating Care Lotion- Clearist CTX
description:
Exfoliating care lotion

Progressive exfoliating and astringent action that refines the appearance of enlarged pores and softens marks in acne-prone skin. Anti-cortisol action to reduce the cosmetic effects of daily stress on the skin.

name: Purifying Cleansing Foam
description:
Cleansing foam formulated for the daily hygiene of acne-prone, seborrhoeic and keratinised skin.

Purifying exfoliating formula that removes dirt clogging the pores and promoting the proliferation of impurities.

name: Dermaled Xpert - Professional LED Phototherapy Device
description:
SKEYNDOR DERMALED-XPERT, is a professional LED phototherapy device that emits 7 different light wavelengths to treat a wide variety of skin concerns in a non-invasive way.

Professional LED phototherapy device with 7 light wavelengths designed to stimulate cellular activity, enhance skin regeneration and boost protocols such as CLEARIST CTX for acne-prone skin

name: CLEARIST CTX Professional cabin treatment
description:
CLEARIST CTX professional cabin treatment

Three-step professional treatment that purifies, regulates excess sebum and controls the impact of stress on acne-prone skin. Enhanced with DERMALED XPERT LED phototherapy.

name: Renewal Peeling Concentrate Ampoule
description:
Renewal Peeling Concentrate, a leave-on peeling ampoule concentrate for moisturising and brightening the skin, based on the best medical beauty peeling techniques.

Its 15% acid formula helps to smooth coarse skin, pores or acne marks. Leave-on peeling ampoule concentrate to moisturise and brighten the skin. Smooths coarse skin with pores or acne marks.

name: Intensive Hydrating Concentrate Ampoule
description:
Intensive Hydrating Concentrate, a moisturising ampoule whose intensive, sustained action provides natural moisturisers and hyaluronic acid precursors – ideal for dry or dehydrated skin.

Concentrated moisturising ampoule with intensive, sustained action.

name: SOS Recovering Concentrate Ampoule
description:
SOS Recovering Concentrate is an ampoule with a soothing, skin restoring effect. Helps to balance, sooth, protect and deeply relieve the skin, especially sensitive, reactive skin or that prone to atopy or couperosis. This concentrate is recommended for use after medical beauty treatments such as laser, peeling…

Ampoule concentrate with a soothing, skin restoring effect. Helps to balance, soothe, protect and deeply comfort the skin.

name: Brightening Glow Concentrate Ampoule
description: Brightening Glow Concentrate is an antioxidant concentrate with Vitamin C derivatives and the combination of three potent antioxidants that brighten and even skin tone by bringing an inner glow of light and enhancing the skin’s natural radiance. /h2>Antioxidant ampoule concentrate that brightens and evens skin tone. Suitable for skin that looks dull, stressed, slightly blemished or starting to show slight signs of ageing

name: Dark-Spot Correcting Ampoule
description:
Dark-Spot Correcting Concentrate is a colour-correcting ampoule that softens the appearance of blemishes and evens out skin tone by lightening age-related yellowness.

Ampoule concentrate that corrects skin colour, smooths blemishes and evens out skin tone.

name: Instant Lifting Ampoule
description:
Your skin’s appearance reflects many things, including accumulated fatigue. Instant Lifting Concentrate is the new ampoule with an instant lifting effect. Has a strong tightening, firming effect for firmer skin without signs of fatigue and a redefined facial contour. This concentrate will ensure your makeup looks more even and lasts longer

. Ampoule concentrate with a tightening, firming effect for firmer skin with no signs of fatigue.

name: Wrinkle Inhibiting Ampoule
description:
Wrinkle Inhibiting Concentrate is an intensive anti-wrinkle ampoule concentrate. Contains a synergy of three powerful decontractors that will make your skin look smoother and wrinkle-free due to its faster, longer-lasting anti-wrinkle action.

Anti-wrinkle ampoule concentrate. Powerful decontractors that will make your skin look smoother and wrinkle-free.

name: Redensifying Filling Ampoule
description: Redensifiying Filling Concentrate contains a potent cell enhancer that stimulates, replenishes and rejuvenates the skin from deep down. If you want to see your skin looking more vital, supple and plumped-up, this is just the concentrate for you. Inspired by corrective aesthetic medicine. Redensifying ampoule concentrate to give your skin a more plumped-up 3D effect. More vital-looking, supple and plump skin.

name: Mattifying Pore Refiner Ampoule
description:
Mattifying Pore Refiner Concentrate, the new mattifying and pore-refining ampoule. This concentrate tightens and smooths the appearance of enlarged pores and evens out skin texture. It regulates excess sebum for a more mattified, shine-free skin.

Nurtures and rebalances the skin’s beneficial flora. Pore-refining and mattifying ampoule concentrate. Regulates excess production of sebum for shine-free skin.

name: 8H Night Repairing Ampoule
description:
8H Night Repairing Concentrate, a repairing night ampoule treatment formulated from a cocktail of bioactive micro-peptides that strengthen the dermoepidermal junction, improving the quality of collagen fibres and other structural elements in the skin.

Night repairing ampoule concentrate. Stimulates skin repair and detoxification overnight.

name: Timeless Prodigy - Global Ultra Anti-Ageing Cream
description:
Global ultra anti-ageing moisturising cream. With over 10 potent active ingredients.

Luxury and science merge to create this prodigious global ultra anti-ageing cream, packed with more than ten powerful active ingredients, including growth factors, proteoglycans, Piedmont white truffle and the revitalising power of 50 million Damask Rose stem cells. Nourishing LC (Liquid Crystal) texture.

name: Timeless Prodigy - Global Ultra Anti-Ageing  Serum
description:
Ultra anti-ageing global moisturising serum, with more than 15 active ingredients.

Luxury and science merge to create this prodigious ultra-ageing global serum. A concentrated serum packed with more than fifteen powerful active ingredients, including growth factors, proteoglycans, Piedmont white truffle and the revitalising power of 50 million Damask Rose stem cells, for a remarkable rejuvenating effect. Comfortable texture

name: Timeless Prodigy - Global Ultra Anti-Ageing Eye Contour
description:
Global ultra anti-ageing eye contour for daily application. Improves skin quality, reduces wrinkles, enhances firmness, redensifies, moisturises, detoxifies and brightens the skin.

Global ultra anti-ageing eye contour for daily application, specially formulated with more than ten powerful active agents, including growth factors, proteoglycans, white Piedmont truffle and the revitalising power of 50 million Damask Rose stem cells. Improves skin quality, reduces wrinkles, enhances firmness, and redensifies, moisturises, detoxifies and brightens the skin.
Part of THE GLOBAL EYE RITUAL, this progressive action ultra anti-ageing ritual treats the delicate area around the eyes. Ideal for counteracting global ageing, for smoothing wrinkles, firming the skin and improving bags and dark circles under the eyes.

name: Timeless Prodigy - The Eye Patch - Ultra anti-ageing concealer patches
description:
Collagen mesh with hyaluronic acid, ideal for smoothing wrinkles and tightening the delicate skin around the eyes.

3D structured native collagen mesh, impregnated with a solution rich in high molecular weight hyaluronic acid.

Included in THE GLOBAL EYE RITUAL, this ultra anti-ageing ritual with progressive action treats the delicate eye contour area. Ideal for counteracting global ageing, for smoothing wrinkles, firming the skin and improving bags and dark circles under the eyes

name: Timeless Prodigy - The Luxury Elixir Intensive Treatment
description:
Progressive anti-ageing elixir. Exclusive 30-day, 3-phase progressive intensive treatment for day and night application.

Phase 1. Cell genesis activators.
Phase 2. Cell quality perfectors.
Phase 3. Cell functionality boosters.

THE AUTHENTIC PROGRESSIVE ACTION ANTI-AGING ELIXIR – THE LUXURY ELIXIR. The exclusive intensive treatment with an evolutionary, multi-gene action based on the perfect combination of 3 cellular rejuvenation strategies. Aimed at recovering optimum skin energy levels and counteracting the damaging effects of daily stress.

name: Timeless Prodigy In-Salon Treatment
description:
Timeless Prodigy in-salon treatment. The Timeless Prodigy ritual is an exclusive treatment with special rituals inspired by the most refined, selective treatments

Global ultra anti-ageing line with evolutionary, multi-gene action. It acts on the cell genesis activators, producing an increase in the number of cells; cell quality enhancers that lengthen the half-life of our cells and delay the onset of their senescence period and finally cell functionality enhancers that boost the functional efficacy of the cell.

name: Slim Drone Double Drone Remodelling Gel Cream
description:
Body gel cream with global remodelling effect. Evens out the appearance of orange peel skin and cellulite through the action of two Cosmetic Drones® (firming drone and anti-cellulite drone).

Cosmetic drone technology is the most advanced active ingredient delivery system available today. It merges different technologies to guide the active ingredients directly to the target cell and release them where they are needed. Its highly effective cellular potency makes it more effective than other release systems.

name: Body remodelling double drone gel-cream with retinol- Sllim drone
description:
Advanced body treatment inspired by regenerative medicine

High-tech body gel-cream that helps reshape the silhouette, firm the skin and visibly improve overall skin quality.

Formulated with Dual Cosmetic Drone® Technology and retinol, it delivers targeted action on adipocytes and fibroblasts to help reduce the appearance of orange-peel skin, improve firmness and promote smoother, more even-looking skin.

Designed as an extension of professional in-clinic treatments, it helps enhance and maintain results at home.

name: Orchid and Wild Roses body lotion Spa Senses
description:
Body milk which hydrates, rebalances and
delicately perfumes the skin.

Nature provides us with precious jewels such as orchid, poppy, ylang-ylang and wild rose that gently purify, rebalance and moisturise the skin. The pleasant texture of this lotion combines the lightness and comfort of a serum with the moisture and maximum care of a cream.

name: Lavender Cinnamon Essence professional Spa Senses
description:
Relaxing essence with lavender and
cinnamon essential oils which nourishes
and perfumes the skin.

Exclusive synergy of two essential oils that relaxes and soothes the senses and prepares the body for a sensory treatment.

name: Ginger Bitter Orange Essence professional Spa Senses
description:
Stimulating essence with ginger and
bitter orange essential oils which
nourishes and perfumes the skin.

This combination of two essential oils stimulates and reactivates the senses, opening the door to the world of sensations provided by Spa Senses treatments.

name: Soy Orange Massage candle professional Spa Senses
description:
Soy and orange body massage candle which melts to create a melting oil, nourishing the
skin while adding its exquisite fragrance.

Body massage candle that melts into an oil with an extraordinary aroma with delicious orange notes. Natural jewels such as soy and coconut provide ultimate relaxation for the body.

name: Cannabis Massage Cream Spa Senses
description:
Soothing body massage cream with cannabis oil extract and enriched with vitamin E.

Body massage cream with cannabis extract, shea butter and enriched with vitamin E capsules, which dissolve to provide antioxidants. Cannabis oil has a soothing and anti-inflammatory effect on the skin.

name: Cannabis Massage Cream professional Spa Senses
description:
Soothing body massage cream with cannabis oil extract and enriched with vitamin E.

Body massage cream with cannabis extract, shea butter and enriched with vitamin E capsules, which dissolve to provide antioxidants. Cannabis oil has a soothing and anti-inflammatory effect on the skin.

name: Bamboo Lotus Massage Rich Cream professional Spa Senses
description:
Hydrating body massage cream with bamboo, lotus flower and water lilies which
remineralises and tones the skin.

This body massage cream is formulated with bamboo, lotus flower and water lily. These ingredients from nature are responsible for remineralising and toning the skin for complete hydration.

name: Indian Spices Massage Oil professional Spa Senses
description:
Balancing body massage oil with Indian
spices, sesame, coconut and black cumin which
helps nourish and repair the skin.

Indian spices, coconut, sesame and black cumin relax all the senses, giving this body massage oil a balancing effect. Nature helps to rebalance our body and mind and repair the skin.

name: Malachite Massage Balm professional Spa Senses
description:
Anti-oxidant body massage gel-oil with malachite extract which provides hydration and
helps remineralise the skin

Antioxidant massage oil balm for the body with malachite extract. This jewel of nature moisturises, remineralises the skin, soothes tensions and relieves stress.

name: Glacier Water Cooling Gel Wrap professional Spa Senses
description:
Stimulating gel body wrap with cold effect made from glacial water and pink peppercorn which soothes
and refreshes the skin.

Glacier water, pink pepper, peppermint and eucalyptus are the natural ingredients that make up this stimulating body wrap. It helps to improve circulation and creates a calming and cooling effect, making it ideal for tired legs.

name: Green Tea Effervescent Wrap profesional Spa Senses
description:
Effervescent body wrap with heat effect, purifying with green tea and citrus fruits.

This body wrap with a warming effect is formulated with green tea and citrus fruits that help to eliminate liquids and impurities from the skin through the stimulating power of nature’s ingredients.

name: Hematite Mud Wrap profesional Spa Senses
description:
Remineralising mud body wrap with hematite and organic mud extract which strengthens the skin’s barrier.

This wrap strengthens the skin’s natural defences withhematite extract, organic mud and water fromSalies-de-Béarn. Nature repairs the skin with itsfirming and remineralising effect.

name: Sapphire Cream Wrap profesional Spa Senses
description:
Creamy, energising body wrap with sapphire particles.

This jewel of well-being, also known as the gem of heaven, provides radiance and deeply revitalises the skin.

name: Sesame And Avocado Butter Peel Spa Senses
Orange and Apricot Cream Peel professional Spa Senses
description:
Antioxidant and illuminating body exfoliant with particles of orange peel and apricot
stone which cleans, smooths and hydrates the skin.

Orange, apricot kernel and grape microparticles cleanse, smooth and moisturise the skin to renew and oxygenate the body. These jewels restore the skin’s radiance thanks to their medium exfoliating power.

name: Charcoal Mud Peel Spa Senses Professional
description:
Remineralising and remodelling body exfoliant with organic mud and volcanic sand
which cleans, smooths and purifies the skin.

Organic mud and charcoal cleanse, smooth and purify the skin. The result: the remineralising and detoxifying effect of nature, thanks to the fine particles of black sand, which provide a natural and deep exfoliation, and the purifying and absorbing properties of charcoal.

name: Charcoal Mud Peel Spa Senses Professional
description:

Organic mud and charcoal cleanse, smooth and purify the skin. The result: the remineralising and detoxifying effect of nature, thanks to the fine particles of black sand, which provide a natural and deep exfoliation, and the purifying and absorbing properties of charcoal.

name: Thermal Salt Scrub Peel Spa Senses Professional
description:
Refreshing and energising body exfoliator with thermal salts that have a renewing effect.

Exfoliating salt particles, an age-old gem from Salies-de-Béarn, contain a concentrated composition of mineral content for an intense renewal of the skin and a refreshing and energising sensorial experience.
